copy.title: Spurs advance to Finals over Thunder in Game 7. Henley wins Charles Schwab. Nvidia surges while Tesla crashes.
copy.keyTakeaway: Spurs outlasted Thunder in a seven-game West Finals slugfest. Nvidia crushed it today while Tesla tanked. Entertainment's noise machine keeps spinning.

todaysHits.sports: Spurs survive Game 7, advance past Thunder 111-103.
todaysHits.markets: Nvidia soars 6.3%, Tesla stumbles 4.6%. SPY flat.
todaysHits.golf: Russell Henley leads Charles Schwab Challenge at 13-under.
todaysHits.culture: Jay-Z goes off at Roots Picnic. Euphoria finale sparks death debate.

culture.topic: Jay-Z went off on Ye, Nicki, Drake
culture.whatHappened: Jay-Z freestyled at the Roots Picnic and tore into Ye, Nicki Minaj, and Drake during his set.
culture.whyItMatters: When Jay-Z uses a stage to air out multiple big names at once, it signals real tension in hip-hop's upper tier — and it usually means something's about to shift in the culture.
culture.whatToSay: Did you catch that Roots Picnic freestyle? Jay went nuclear.

culture.topic: Sam Levinson defends Euphoria Season 3 death
culture.whatHappened: The show's creator defended a major character death in the Season 3 finale, calling it honest and necessary storytelling.
culture.whyItMatters: Euphoria viewers are split, and Levinson's explanation matters because it shows whether he's just shocking people for views or actually committing to the story he set up.
culture.whatToSay: Levinson said the death had to happen. Whether you buy that depends on whether you think the show earns its darkness.

culture.whatHappened: Steven Soderbergh's spy thriller: Michael Fassbender and Cate Blanchett as intelligence agents who are married to each other — until one of them is suspected of being a mole.

glance.sports: Spurs survive Game 7 thriller, beat Thunder 111-103 to reach Finals after 4-3 series grind.
glance.market: Tech split decision: NVDA rips +6.3% while TSLA dumps -4.6%; SPY treads water at +0.3%.
glance.bestConvo: San Antonio just went to war in a Game 7 against OKC — ask someone if they watched that clincher.
glance.watchNext: Spurs Finals opponent reveal within 24 hours; also watch whether NVDA's jump sticks or Thursday brings profit-taking.
glance.quickRec: Russell Henley leading the Charles Schwab Challenge at -13 — if you golf or bet golf, he's the guy to follow.
